scenario: Japanese A1: Personal Pronouns and To Be 🗣️
text: In Japanese, how do you say 'To be - Polite'? {{c1::です (desu)}}
explanation: Vocabulary for the topic 'Personal Pronouns and To Be'. Level: A1.
usage: Term: です (desu) | Meaning: To be - Polite
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'To be - Polite' en Japanese? です (desu)

scenario: Japanese A1: Personal Pronouns and To Be 🗣️
text: In Japanese, how do you say 'To not be - Polite'? {{c1::ではありません (dewa arimasen)}}
explanation: Vocabulary for the topic 'Personal Pronouns and To Be'. Level: A1.
usage: Term: ではありません (dewa arimasen) | Meaning: To not be - Polite
spanish: ¿Cómo se dice 'To not be - Polite' en Japanese? ではありません (dewa arimasen)

text: In Japanese, how do you say 'Is it?'? {{c1::ですか (desu ka?)}}

scenario: Japanese A1: Personal Pronouns and To Be 🗣️
text: In Japanese, how do you say 'I am a student'? {{c1::学生です (gakusei desu)}}

usage: Term: 学生です (gakusei desu) | Meaning: I am a student
